channel.title: 日本神経学会トピックス
channel.description: 日本神経学会の最新トピック情報

item.title: 【2026-04-16】The National Institute for Basic Biology (SOKENDAI, Graduate University for Advanced Studies, Department of Basic Biology) will hold a graduate school information session on Saturday, May 9th, in a hybrid format both at the National Institute for Basic Biology (on-site) and online.
item.description: The National Institute for Basic Biology (SOKENDAI, Graduate University for Advanced Studies, Department of Basic Biology) will hold a graduate school information session on Saturday, May 9th, in a hybrid format both at the National Institute for Basic Biology (on-site) and online.

item.title: 【2026-04-17】Announcement of the 2026 Life Sciences 4 Platform Support Briefing and Results Symposium
item.description: Announcement of the 2026 Life Sciences 4 Platform Support Briefing and Results Symposium
